title: Contracts

dictionary.title: About this archive
dictionary.frozen: Data frozen Sep 28 2025 — COMPRANET's federal feed closed after its legal abolition (Apr 2025). No 2026 records exist; this is a complete, citable historical archive, not a live feed.
dictionary.export: Downloads honor your current filters (title/description search, sector, year, institution, category, risk level, procedure flags, amount and risk-factor), capped at the first 10,000 rows — narrow the filters to retrieve a full slice.
dictionary.contract: Contract — one awarded procurement record (vendor · institution · amount · date).
dictionary.directAward: Direct award (adjudicación directa) — awarded without a competitive tender.
dictionary.singleBid: Single bid — a competitive procedure that drew only one bidder.
dictionary.risk: Risk indicator — model similarity (0–1) to documented corruption patterns. An investigation signal, not proof of irregularity.
dictionary.category: Category (partida) — the CUCoP spending classification of the goods/services.

searchPlaceholder: Search by title or contract number...
guidance: Select a preset to start investigating, or use filters to find specific contracts. Click any row to expand risk factors. Use the compare tool to analyze contracts side-by-side.

suspiciousMonopolies.label: Single-Bidder Contracts
suspiciousMonopolies.description: Critical-risk single-bidder contracts — one vendor in a competitive procedure

decemberRush.label: December Rush
decemberRush.description: High-risk year-end contracts — elevated spending before fiscal close

priceManipulation.label: Price Manipulation
priceManipulation.description: Statistical price outliers — contracts priced far above sector norm

ghostCompanies.label: Industry Mismatch
ghostCompanies.description: Direct awards to vendors operating outside their registered industry — a pattern associated with shell entities

networkClusters.label: Network Clusters
networkClusters.description: Critical-risk network member contracts — vendors with high co-bidding activity

splitContracts.label: Split Contracts
splitContracts.description: Threshold splitting — multiple same-day contracts near oversight thresholds

mostAnomalous.label: Most Anomalous
mostAnomalous.description: Contracts furthest from statistical norms — highest Mahalanobis distance across all risk dimensions

recentCritical.label: Recent & Critical
recentCritical.description: 2024 critical-risk contracts — most recent high-scoring results

biggestDirectAwards.label: Biggest Direct Awards
biggestDirectAwards.description: Largest contracts bypassing competitive tender — highest value without competition

table.anomalyTooltip: Mahalanobis distance — how statistically unusual this contract is across all risk dimensions. Higher = more unusual.
table.riskScoreTooltipBody: The risk score (0-1) measures similarity to documented corruption patterns. It is not proof of irregularity — it is an investigation signal.

pre2010Banner: Contracts from 2002–2010 have limited data quality (RFC <1%). Risk indicators for this period are directional estimates only.
empty: No contracts found matching your filters.
emptyInitialDesc: Search any contract, institution, or vendor name to begin. Or use the filters above to browse by sector, year, or risk level.
emptyFilteredDesc: Try adjusting your search or clearing the active filters
